section: # -- client_policy.csv: Model constants, allocation policy, withdrawal policy, forced actions, scenarios, and Monte Carlo settings.

label: reinvest_dividends

notes: Per-account override of Economic Assumptions/reinvest_dividends_default. Leave blank to inherit the global switch. Ignored while the global switch is YES.

notes: Per-account override of Economic Assumptions/reinvest_dividends_default. Leave blank to inherit the global switch. Ignored while the global switch is YES.

label: heloc_enabled
notes: Enable the HELOC strategy. When Yes, the projection draws from the HELOC during the draw period to fund large discretionary spending instead of liquidating portfolio assets.

label: heloc_credit_limit
notes: Maximum HELOC credit line available. The projection will not borrow beyond this amount.

label: heloc_draw_end_year
notes: Last year the HELOC can be drawn. After this year no new borrowing occurs; the outstanding balance accrues interest until repaid at home sale.

label: heloc_initial_rate_pct
notes: Starting annual interest rate on the HELOC balance (variable rate). Interest is paid from cash flow each year.

label: heloc_rate_drift_bps_yr
notes: Annual rate increase in basis points per year (e.g. 25 = +0.25%/yr). Models a rising-rate environment over the draw period.

label: heloc_repayment_years
notes: Number of years to fully amortize the HELOC balance after the draw period ends. Each year the projection pays P+I computed from an amortization schedule; interest portion continues to flow through cash flow and declines to zero as the balance is paid off.

label: holding_period_allocation_enabled
notes: Off by default. When YES, the optimizer/max-Sharpe recommendation modes nudge near-term (0-2yr) withdrawal-derived balance toward Cash and durable (16+yr) balance toward growth classes, using this household's own projected withdrawal schedule. Has no effect on user_target or tangency modes; selecting allocation_selection_mode=real_loss_aware enables the same discovery automatically.

label: holding_period_floor_strength
notes: Only used when holding_period_allocation_enabled is YES. Scales how strongly the near-term/long-horizon floors are applied; 100% applies the full floor, 0% disables it without turning the feature off.

label: real_loss_aware_risk_aversion
notes: Only used when allocation_selection_mode is real_loss_aware. Mean-variance risk-aversion coefficient for each holding-period bucket's solve.

label: real_loss_aware_weight
notes: Only used when allocation_selection_mode is real_loss_aware. Scales the added real-loss-probability penalty relative to variance in each holding-period bucket's solve; higher values weight the real-loss curves more heavily versus expected return/variance.

label: capital_market_assumption_horizon_years
notes: Supported values: 1|3|5|10|20|25|30. Planning horizon for allocation optimizer assumptions. Ignored when capital_market_assumption_horizon_source is auto_from_withdrawals.

label: capital_market_assumption_horizon_source
notes: manual (default) uses the horizon above. auto_from_withdrawals derives the effective horizon from this household's own projected withdrawal schedule instead.

label: capital_market_assumption_preset
notes: CONSERVATIVE, BASELINE, or AGGRESSIVE. Shifts return/volatility assumptions before per-asset overrides.

label: rollover_401k_year
notes: Year Member_1_401k rolls into Member_1_IRA

label: spending_freeze_year
notes: Year base spending stops inflating (frozen in real terms)

label: ss_claim_age
notes: Modeled: age 62-70 claim age; benefits entered as age-70 amounts are adjusted using SSA early/delayed factors.

label: rmd_start_age
notes: SECURE 2.0 RMD start age

label: roth_conv_window_end_offset
notes: CONV_END_YR = H_RMD_start_yr + this offset (default -1 = year before RMDs)

label: irmaa_tier2_mfj_base_year
notes: Tier 2 MFJ threshold in 2025 table; annual tax-update workflow must refresh thresholds and dashboard provenance.

label: irmaa_annual_inflator
notes: Annual IRMAA threshold inflation rate

label: mc_portfolio_sigma
notes: Portfolio return standard deviation for Monte Carlo (1,000 sims)

label: mc_simulations
notes: Number of exact scalar Monte Carlo simulation paths for interactive builds; raise for final advisor runs

label: mc_sensitivity_simulations
notes: Exact scalar re-simulations per μ/σ sensitivity-grid cell; raise for final advisor runs if runtime allows.

label: mc_engine_mode
notes: Advisor-ready default exact scalar path Monte Carlo; set to vectorized only for faster approximate diagnostics.

label: success_liquid_floor
notes: Minimum liquid assets required in every simulated year for funding success

label: stochastic_tax_brackets
notes: Add random noise to tax bracket inflation

label: stochastic_irmaa
notes: Add random noise to IRMAA thresholds

label: wellness_cost_shocks
notes: Poisson wellness cost events

label: wellness_shock_annual_prob
notes: Annual probability of a wellness shock

label: wellness_shock_mean_cost
notes: Mean cost of a wellness shock event

label: recenter_regime_returns
notes: Re-center regime/fat-tail return draws so configured return is the expected return

label: stochastic_inflation
notes: Sample annual inflation paths correlated with market returns; affects simulated spending/COLA/bracket/IRMAA/medical inflation.

label: inflation_sigma
notes: Annual inflation volatility used by Monte Carlo stochastic inflation.

label: return_inflation_correlation
notes: Approximate correlation between market returns and inflation surprises.

label: use_asset_class_covariance
notes: Use asset-class expected returns/covariance and target allocation for main MC return paths.

label: return_serial_correlation
notes: AR(1)-style serial dependence in simulated annual portfolio returns.

label: mc_home_equity_contingency
notes: Include home equity as last-resort contingency: compute a second success rate counting home equity (after haircut) as spendable if liquid assets are depleted

label: mc_home_equity_haircut
notes: Haircut applied to gross home equity when used as MC contingency reserve

label: mc_home_equity_access_lag_years
notes: Years of delay before home equity can be accessed as contingency in MC paths

label: selling_cost_pct
notes: Realtor commission + closing costs as % of gross price

label: ltcg_0pct_top_mfj_base_year
notes: Top of 0% LTCG bracket (MFJ 2026); inflated annually

label: ltcg_15pct_top_mfj_base_year
notes: Top of 15% LTCG bracket (MFJ 2026); inflated annually

label: niit_magi_threshold_mfj
notes: MAGI above which 3.8% NIIT applies (MFJ; not inflated)

label: equity_pct
notes: Equity allocation (stocks/ETFs)

label: commodity_pct
notes: Commodity/real asset allocation

label: cash_pct
notes: Cash/money market allocation

label: risk_tolerance
notes: 0=auto-derive from age and withdrawal rate; 1-10=manual

label: human_capital_stability
notes: 0.8=stable W-2; 0.5=variable/self-employed

label: concentration_employer_stock
notes: Existing employer stock as % of total wealth

label: concentration_real_estate
notes: Non-home real estate as % of total wealth

label: concentration_business
notes: Business equity as % of total wealth

label: glide_path
notes: target_date=de-risk approaching retirement; static=fixed

label: inflation_sensitive_spending_pct
notes: Fraction of spending that is inflation-sensitive (start with 15)

label: cash_target_pct
notes: Cash buffer as % of portfolio (market timing protection)

label: include_home_equity_in_allocation_view
notes: YES includes home equity in the Total Portfolio Mix section for allocation context.

label: liquid_reit_target_pct_when_home_not_counted
notes: Default 5%; liquid REIT target if REITs are enabled and home equity is not counted toward the real-estate target.

label: allocation_selection_mode
notes: Toggle: user_target uses the user-specified target_pct rows; optimizer_recommendation uses the allocation optimizer recommendation. Optimizer is based on risk tolerance/auto risk score, age, withdrawal rate, years to retirement, human-capital stability, guaranteed-income coverage, home-equity/REIT switches, concentration flags, capital-market assumptions, correlations, glide path, and inflation-sensitive spending.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 40%; U.S. large-cap equity. Example vehicles: VTI, ITOT, VOO. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 5%; U.S. mid-cap equity. Example vehicles: VO, IWR, SCHM. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 5%; U.S. small-cap/value tilt. Example vehicles: AVUV, VBR, IWM. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 20%; developed international equity. Example vehicles: VXUS, IXUS, VEA. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 5%; emerging markets equity. Example vehicles: VWO, IEMG, EEM. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 15%; core investment-grade bonds. Example vehicles: BND, AGG, SCHZ. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 5%; short-duration reserve/bond sleeve. Example vehicles: SGOV, SHY, USFR. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 0%; optional inflation-linked bonds. Example vehicles: TIP, SCHP, VTIP. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 0%; optional tax-sensitive bond sleeve. Example vehicles: MUB, VTEB, TFI. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 0%; optional liquid real estate. Example vehicles: VNQ, SCHH, IYR. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 0%; optional real-asset/inflation-shock sleeve. Example vehicles: PDBC, DJP, GSG. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 0%; optional trend-following diversifier. Example vehicles: DBMF, KMLM, CTA. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 0%; optional senior-loan/CLO-style credit. Example vehicles: BKLN, SRLN, JAAA. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: target_pct
notes: Default 5%; liquidity reserve/money market. Example vehicles: CASH, SGOV, BIL. User may override, but all target_pct rows should total 100%.

label: RMD
notes: Withdrawal cascade row edited from the User UI compressed withdrawal-order table.

label: HSA
notes: Withdrawal cascade row edited from the User UI compressed withdrawal-order table.

label: IRA_elective
notes: Withdrawal cascade row edited from the User UI compressed withdrawal-order table.

label: Trust
notes: Withdrawal cascade row edited from the User UI compressed withdrawal-order table.

label: Roth
notes: Withdrawal cascade row edited from the User UI compressed withdrawal-order table.

label: Home_equity_tap
notes: Withdrawal cascade row edited from the User UI compressed withdrawal-order table.

label: annual_funding_tolerance
notes: inflows must equal outflows within 10 USD per year (no silent shortfalls)

label: tlh_policy
notes: off | analyze_only | apply. off ignores tax-loss harvesting. analyze_only surfaces opportunities on the Tax-Loss Harvesting sheet without changing the projection. apply harvests qualifying loss lots each year inside the projection so terminal net worth and lifetime tax reflect the strategy.

label: tlh_min_loss_dollars
notes: Minimum dollar loss on a lot before it is worth harvesting (avoids trivial trades).

label: tlh_min_loss_pct
notes: Minimum loss as a percentage of the lot's cost basis before harvesting (avoids near-breakeven lots).

label: tlh_annual_ceiling
notes: Maximum harvested loss per year (0 = unlimited). Caps how much loss is realized annually.

label: tlh_transaction_cost_bps
notes: Round-trip trading cost, in basis points (hundredths of a percent) of harvested market value — not a dollar amount. 2 bps = 0.02%; 100 bps = 1%. A typical low-cost brokerage trade is 0-5 bps.

label: tlh_fraction_sold_before_death
notes: Planning assumption: fraction of the lower-basis replacement expected to be sold (and its larger gain taxed) before basis step-up at death. Lower values make harvesting more permanently valuable.

label: roth_conversion_policy
notes: optimize_terminal_tax | fill_to_bracket | fill_to_irmaa | fixed_dollar | none

label: roth_bracket_strategy
notes: NONE | FILL_CURRENT_BRACKET | FILL_TARGET_BRACKET | PARTIAL_TARGET_BRACKET | IRMAA_GUARDED | SURVIVOR_TAX_AWARE | RMD_REDUCTION | LEGACY_TARGETED | OPTIMIZER_CHOOSES | FIXED_DOLLAR; strategy family considered by the Roth optimizer.

label: max_annual_conversion_pct_of_traditional_ira
notes: Maximum voluntary conversion in a year as a percentage of starting traditional IRA/pre-tax balances.

label: max_conversion_years
notes: Maximum number of years in the voluntary conversion window, also bounded by the RMD-age window.

label: roth_objective_mode
notes: BALANCED_RETIREMENT | MINIMIZE_LIFETIME_TAX | MAXIMIZE_TERMINAL_NET_WORTH | LEGACY_OPTIMIZED | ESTATE_TAX_AWARE | CUSTOM_WEIGHTED; default balances tax, terminal wealth, survivor, legacy and estate factors.

label: estate_tax_objective_mode
notes: OFF | MONITOR_ONLY | BALANCED | STRONG; affects Roth scoring when projected federal or state estate tax exposure exists; zero effect when no estate tax is projected.

label: roth_headroom_usage_pct
notes: Use this percentage of tax bracket headroom for voluntary conversions; leaves margin below the threshold.

label: roth_target_bracket_rate
notes: 10.00% | 12.00% | 22.00% | 24.00% | 32.00% | 35.00% | 37.00%; Target marginal bracket ceiling for bracket-fill Roth conversion policies.

label: roth_irmaa_cap
notes: Cap conversions at IRMAA tier threshold

label: roth_irmaa_target_tier
notes: TIER_1 | TIER_2 | TIER_3 | TIER_4 | TIER_5; IRMAA cap tier used by Roth conversion guardrails; labels show MFJ/single dollar thresholds from annual tax data.

label: irmaa_guardrail_mode
notes: IGNORE | WARN_ONLY | AVOID_NEXT_TIER | AVOID_TIER_2_OR_ABOVE | CUSTOM_MAGI_CAP; controls how Medicare IRMAA cliffs constrain Roth conversions.

label: roth_irmaa_headroom_usage_pct
notes: Use this percentage of available IRMAA headroom before stopping voluntary conversions.

label: roth_fixed_annual_amount
notes: Annual amount for fixed_dollar policy

label: roth_optimize_terminal_weight
notes: Weight on after-tax terminal net worth in optimizer objective

label: roth_optimize_lifetime_tax_weight
notes: Weight on lifetime tax penalty in optimizer objective

label: roth_optimize_terminal_pretax_tax_rate
notes: After-tax haircut applied to terminal pre-tax balances for objective scoring

label: legacy_objective_mode
notes: OFF | LOW | BALANCED | STRONG; BALANCED adds future-tax and inheritance-burden weighting to Roth conversion optimization.

label: future_tax_rate_stress_pct
notes: Additional future ordinary-tax-rate stress used only for scoring Roth conversion candidates.

label: future_tax_risk_weight
notes: Weight on reducing future pre-tax IRA exposure if tax rates rise faster than modeled.

label: inheritance_tax_burden_weight
notes: Weight on reducing the ordinary-income tax burden heirs may inherit with pre-tax retirement assets.

label: heir_ordinary_tax_rate_assumption_pct
notes: Assumed ordinary-income tax rate heirs may pay on inherited pre-tax retirement distributions.

label: pre_tax_bequest_penalty_pct
notes: Objective haircut applied to terminal pre-tax balances to reflect inheritance tax burden.

label: roth_bequest_preference_bonus_pct
notes: Objective bonus for terminal Roth balances left to heirs or future-self tax flexibility.

label: survivor_tax_risk_weight
notes: Weight on reducing pre-tax exposure during years when one spouse may face single-filer tax compression.

label: decedent_balances_pass_to_survivor
notes: in year after first death all decedent IRA/401k/Roth/Trust/HSA balances transfer to survivor; decedent accounts zeroed; RMDs continue under survivor age

section: # -- Forced Roth Conversions: source account, year, and amount --

label: source_account
notes: Member_1_401k | Member_1_IRA | Member_2_IRA; pre-tax account to convert from

label: year
notes: Calendar year the forced conversion is applied

label: amount
notes: Dollar amount to convert from the selected account to that owner’s Roth account

label: description
notes: the base case is the plan as built from all inputs above

label: allocation_selection_mode
notes: What-if: change allocation scenario to use user-specified target_pct allocation; scenario analysis applies the allocation-implied expected return/volatility.

label: allocation_selection_mode
notes: What-if: change allocation scenario to use the optimizer-defined allocation; scenario analysis applies the allocation-implied expected return/volatility.

label: member_1_retire_year
notes: Member 1 retires 2029 vs 2027 base case (2 years later)

label: income_growth_rate_override
notes: Income growth in extension years (0% = flat income matching final base year; use earn_inc to match base growth)

label: salary_override
notes: S-Corp W-2 salary in extension years; lower reflects reduced hours / part-time practice

label: spend_multiplier
notes: what-if: base spending 20% higher every year

label: home_downsize_year
notes: what-if: sell and downsize in this year (blank = no downsize)

label: home_downsize_net_proceeds
notes: net liquid proceeds added if downsizing

label: home_sale_year
notes: Year of planned home sale in this scenario

label: home_sale_proceeds_account
notes: Account to receive net proceeds

label: inflation_override
notes: what-if: sustained 4.5% general inflation regime

label: annuity_div_override
notes: Override all annuity dividend rates to 4.50% (vs illustrated 5.50-5.75%)

label: annuity_split_override
notes: Leave blank to keep current 80/20 split

label: annuity_div_override
notes: Leave blank to keep current dividend rates

label: annuity_split_override
notes: Override all annuity cash pct to 50% (vs illustrated 80%)

label: include_sell_home
notes: Stack the sell-home override

label: include_low_return
notes: Stack the low-return override

label: include_high_inflation
notes: Stack high inflation

label: include_spend_more
notes: Stack higher spending

label: include_retire_later
notes: Stack retire later

label: include_pdia_low_div
notes: Stack 4.5% PDIA dividend

label: include_pdia_5050
notes: Stack 50/50 PDIA split in combined stress test.

label: onset_age_moderate_home_care
notes: Age (of the older spouse) the Moderate Home Care LTC scenario's cost stream starts

label: onset_age_severe_home_care
notes: Age (of the older spouse) the Severe Home Care LTC scenario's cost stream starts

label: onset_age_facility_memory_care
notes: Age (of the older spouse) the Facility (Memory Care) LTC scenario's cost stream starts

label: onset_age_catastrophic_both
notes: Age (of the older spouse) the Catastrophic (Both) LTC scenario's cost stream starts

label: divorce_year
notes: demo scenario; disabled unless explicitly enabled

label: transfer_amount
notes: use pct

label: monthly_amount
notes: paid by Member 1

label: taxable_pre_2019_rules
notes: TCJA neutral

label: roth_tax_discount_rate
notes: Present-value discount rate for lifetime taxes in Roth optimizer scoring.

label: roth_conversion_target_bracket_base_year
notes: Fill to top of this bracket through CONV_END_YR

label: member_1_rmd_start_age
notes: Optional per-member RMD start age; defaults to household rmd_start_age.

label: member_2_rmd_start_age
notes: Optional per-member RMD start age; defaults to household rmd_start_age.

label: real_dollar_reporting_enabled
notes: Show real/today-dollar metrics in projection rows and summary output.

label: index_hsa_limit
notes: Index HSA contribution limit after base year.

label: requires_hdhp
notes: Stop modeled HSA contributions when no pre-Medicare HDHP-eligible spouse remains.
